title: After the Tenno Sho (Spring): Answering Words

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Ines Fujin wins the spring Tenno Sho, snatching
victory from the clutches of the prestigious
competition.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But while she celebrates her win, Mejiro Ryan
faces her fans and, even after her loss, makes a
rousing declaration that reinvigorates both them
and herself.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Ines watches closely. Sensing that Mejiro Ryan is
on another level from her, she begins to seriously
consider the way she engages with her supporters.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In part to determine whether she has what it takes
to reach Ryan's level, Ines decides to throw
herself into training for the Takarazuka Kinen!
